description: Strong candidates monitored for potential core promotion. Each entry must include a reason and competitive score.

candidates.name: Vonage / Bandwidth
candidates.reason: Alternative SIP/carrier providers with competitive pricing. Monitor for feature parity with Twilio.

candidates.name: AssemblyAI
candidates.reason: Strong accuracy and features. Slightly higher latency than Deepgram for real-time. Monitor for streaming improvements.

candidates.name: Whisper (OpenAI)
candidates.reason: High accuracy but not optimized for real-time streaming. Good for async transcription use cases.

candidates.name: Anthropic Claude
candidates.reason: Strong reasoning and safety. Lacks native Realtime API. Monitor for real-time voice capabilities.

candidates.name: Gemini Live (Google)
candidates.reason: Native multimodal real-time API. Competitive with OpenAI Realtime. Monitor for stability and ecosystem.

candidates.name: OpenAI TTS
candidates.reason: Good quality and easy integration with OpenAI stack. Less natural than ElevenLabs for commercial voice.

candidates.name: Cartesia
candidates.reason: Ultra-low latency TTS. Strong candidate for fast-path where speed matters more than naturalness.

candidates.name: LiveKit Agents
candidates.reason: Open-source, WebRTC-native, highly flexible. Strong for custom architectures. Less turnkey than Vapi.

candidates.name: Pipedrive
candidates.reason: Strong for sales-focused pipelines. Good API. Monitor for enterprise feature growth.

candidates.name: Hamming
candidates.reason: Specialized voice agent eval platform. Strong automated testing capabilities. Monitor for production readiness.

candidates.name: Braintrust
candidates.reason: Strong LLM eval platform with traces and human review. Good complement to custom eval layer.
